title: How A Beauty Company Built An AI Agent — With Rachel Williamson and Josh Siebert
summary: Ulta Beauty deployed ServiceNow's AI-powered HR platform across its 65,000-person workforce to automate employee-facing processes including hiring and onboarding. The implementation required decisions about where to automate versus where to keep humans in the loop, with personalization emphasized over standardized handbooks.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz speaks with Rachel Williamson and Josh Siebert about Ulta Beauty's deployment of ServiceNow's AI-powered HR platform across a 65,000-person workforce. The conversation covers how the company handled automation decisions, where it kept humans in the loop, and how it applied personalization to employee processes including hiring and onboarding. It offers a concrete look at moving an AI agent into HR operations at enterprise scale rather than a theoretical pitch.
